landing.kicker: what if you had picked the other one
landing.subtitle: Every choice you made has a ghost — the version of you that picked the other road. Here, you meet them.
landing.door_one_title: Walk the road you didn't take.
landing.door_one_subtitle: Pick a fork. A thousand versions of you took the other one, and grew old there. See what became of them.
landing.door_one_hint: begin with: a regret · a turn you almost made · a road →
landing.door_two_subtitle: A city's last hour. A novel's missing ending. A redacted file. We rebuild what mighta been there.
landing.door_two_hint: begin with: a ruin · a redaction · a missing page →
landing.footer_kicker: made with a swarm of LLM agents · open source · bring your own key
landing.footer_tagline: mighta — the lives you didn't live

spawn.title: Tell us a fork in your road.
spawn.subtitle: We'll show you six versions of you that took the other one.
spawn.field_bio_placeholder: Anything that makes you feel real.
spawn.field_forks_hint: leave 'when' blank for just age · '~age' positions the timeline
spawn.no_key: you'll need an API key first.
spawn.refork_hint: branch deeper into this version's life
generating: writing six lives you never lived…

akinator.question: question
akinator.last_hint: last one — then we spawn six versions of you
akinator.q1: The last thing you regretted — did you do it, or did you not?
akinator.q1_a: I did it. I shouldn't have.
akinator.q1_a_bio: Someone who acts and then regrets the act.
akinator.q1_a_event: Said something / did something they couldn't take back
akinator.q1_b_bio: Someone who holds back and then regrets the silence.
akinator.q1_b_event: Didn't speak when speaking was the thing
akinator.q2: Which would scare you more — failing the exam, or being confessed to?
akinator.q2_a_bio: Fears measurable failure more than messy intimacy.
akinator.q2_b_bio: Fears intimacy more than measurable failure.
akinator.q3: Would you move to a strange city for the right person?
akinator.q3_a_bio: Has at least once chosen another person over their own coordinates.
akinator.q3_a_event: Considered (or made) a move for someone else's life
akinator.q3_b_bio: Has kept their geography over offered intimacy.
akinator.q3_b_event: Stayed when leaving was an option
akinator.q4: The person you miss most — did they die, or did you just lose touch?
akinator.q4_a_bio: Carries the kind of grief that doesn't move.
akinator.q4_a_event: A death they're still organized around
akinator.q4_b_bio: Carries the kind of regret that could still be undone if they were brave enough.
akinator.q4_b_event: Let a friendship die slowly without naming it
akinator.q5: Has your work ever made you want to cry?
akinator.q5_a_bio: Has worked at the edge of what they can stand.
akinator.q5_b_bio: Has worked, mostly, within their tolerance.
akinator.q6: What scares you more — becoming a parent, or not becoming one?
akinator.q6_a_bio: Has thought about it and pulled back at the cost.
akinator.q6_a_event: Said no, or kept saying not yet, to parenthood
akinator.q6_b_bio: Has thought about it and pulled toward at the cost.
akinator.q6_b_event: Counted the years it could still happen
akinator.q7: If you had to choose tonight — go back to one day, or forward to one?
akinator.q7_a_bio: Carries a specific day they'd return to.
akinator.q7_b_bio: Carries a specific question only the future answers.

restore.title: Restore what almost was.
restore.subtitle: Pompeii's last morning. A novel's missing ending. A redacted file. A swarm of agents rewrites what mighta been there.
restore.placeholder_msg: Soon. The agents are still growing up.

settings.title: Your key.
settings.intro_post: . Your key stays in this browser (

import.title: Paste anything. We'll find the forks.
import.description: A bio, an obituary, a Wikipedia paragraph, a journal entry, a CV. We extract the life into key forks you can fork further.
import.textarea_placeholder: Paste a paragraph or a few...
import.preview_review: edit any of these. clean any noise. then apply.
import.note: stays in your browser · uses your key
import.error_too_large: file is too large — please trim to under 200KB.

errors.missing_api_key: This road needs a key. Settings →
errors.model_parse: The model said something we couldn't read. Try again?
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Check the console.
